apigateway-desc: Routes external API endpoints transparently through the MediaWiki REST API with per-endpoint token injection
right-apigateway: Use the API gateway to access external APIs
apigateway-error-permissiondenied: You do not have permission to use the API gateway.
apigateway-error-badtoken: Invalid or missing CSRF token. A valid token is required for write operations.
apigateway-error-unknownendpoint: Unknown API endpoint: "$1". This endpoint is not configured.
apigateway-error-methodnotallowed: HTTP method $1 is not allowed for endpoint "$2".
apigateway-error-invalidurl: The constructed target URL is invalid.
apigateway-error-invalidscheme: URL scheme "$1" is not allowed. Only http and https are supported.
apigateway-error-ssrf: The target URL resolves to a private or reserved network address and cannot be accessed.
apigateway-error-bodytoolarge: Request body exceeds the maximum allowed size of $1 bytes.
